differences.justification: Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by the EmbeddingStore<TextSegment> API implemented by MilvusV2EmbeddingStore (add/addAll/search).
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by the EmbeddingStore<TextSegment> API implemented by MilvusV2EmbeddingStore.
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by the EmbeddingStore search API; MilvusV2EmbeddingSearchRequest also extends it.
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by the EmbeddingStore search API (return type of search()).
Core langchain4j type intentionally exposed by the EmbeddingStore filtering/removal API (removeAll(Filter), search filtering).
Milvus SDK type intentionally exposed by the builder so callers can supply their own client (Builder.milvusClient(MilvusClientV2)); mirrors langchain4j-milvus (v1).
Milvus SDK type intentionally exposed by the builder for consistency-level configuration (Builder.consistencyLevel(...)); mirrors langchain4j-milvus (v1).
Milvus SDK type intentionally exposed by the builder for index-type configuration (Builder.indexType(...)/sparseIndexType(...)); mirrors langchain4j-milvus (v1).
Milvus SDK type intentionally exposed by the builder for metric-type configuration (Builder.metricType(...)/sparseMetricType(...)); mirrors langchain4j-milvus (v1).
